Feature: Internal Data Dashboard with Trend Visualization

The data analytics team wants to build an internal dashboard that displays
aggregated business metrics with trend visualization. The system will:

- Pull anonymized, aggregated sales data from the data warehouse on a
  daily schedule
- Compute moving averages, quarter-over-quarter growth rates, and
  seasonal adjustment factors using standard statistical methods
- Display interactive charts and tables in a web dashboard accessible
  to the product and sales teams
- Generate weekly summary bullet points highlighting notable trends
  (e.g., "Q3 revenue is tracking 12% above Q2")
- No individual customer or employee data is used — all metrics are
  pre-aggregated at the product line or regional level

The dashboard processes only anonymized, aggregated business data. It does
not make any decisions, recommendations, or predictions about natural
persons. No personal data is processed at any stage of the pipeline.

The system is a read-only reporting tool with no decision-making capability.
It is deployed on the internal network and accessible only to authenticated
employees. The AI component is limited to trend summarization — the
underlying statistical computations use deterministic algorithms.

This is a standard business intelligence tool to replace our current
spreadsheet-based reporting workflow.
